# Multiple Versions and Multiple Release Tracks

Autogen supports configuring multiple API versions and multiple release tracks
in the gcloud_config file. One API version can be mapped to one or more gcloud
[release tracks](https://g3doc.corp.google.com/company/teams/cloud-sdk/cli/contrib/launch.md#release-tracks).

## gcloud Config

Use
[`api`](https://source.corp.google.com/piper///depot/google3/cloud/sdk/tools/gen_sfc/config/gcloud_config_schema_v2.yaml;l=195;rcl=663465290)
definition to configure an individual API interface with
[`api_version`](https://source.corp.google.com/piper///depot/google3/cloud/sdk/tools/gen_sfc/config/gcloud_config_schema_v2.yaml;l=205;rcl=663465290)
and
[`release_tracks`](https://source.corp.google.com/piper///depot/google3/cloud/sdk/tools/gen_sfc/config/gcloud_config_schema_v2.yaml;l=208;rcl=663465290)
attributes to map to your gcloud command implementation. If you need to
configure multiple API versions, define several API interfaces as needed.


```
apis:
- name: ServiceOne
  api_version: v1
  release_tracks:
  - GA
- name: ServiceOne
  api_version: v1alpha
  release_tracks:
  - ALPHA
- name: ServiceTwo
  api_version: v1alpha
  release_tracks:
  - ALPHA
```

## YAML Output:

*  Commands and command groups for Service One will be in ALPHA and GA.

```
@base.ReleaseTracks(base.ReleaseTrack.ALPHA)
@base.Autogenerated
class ResourceInServiceOneAlpha(extensions.ResourceInServiceOneAlpha):


@base.ReleaseTracks(base.ReleaseTrack.GA)
@base.Autogenerated
class ResourceInServiceOneGa(extensions.ResourceInServiceOneGa):
```

*  Commands and command groups for Service Two will be only in ALPHA.

```
@base.ReleaseTracks(base.ReleaseTrack.ALPHA)
@base.Autogenerated
class ResourceInServiceTwoAlpha(extensions.ResourceInServiceTwoAlpha):
```
